channel.title: Category page not found error
channel.description:
Hello community, I am trying to find all post related to a category but I get this error entity from endpoint "categories" with slug "rumorroundup" not found.
I have category named rumorroundup and I want to find all post related to this category but frontity showing error. Help
Thanks

item.title: Category page not found error
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
If you could provide a repository with the code of your project, the community (or any member of the Frontity team) would be able to clone your project and try to reproduce the issue you’re having
With this info, it’ll be much easier to help you with your issue

If you can’t share your whole project, please create a CodeSandbox (you can start with this template) or a GitHub repository with the minimal amount of code to reproduce the issue.

Read full topic

item.title: Category page not found error
item.dc:creator: techymanjil96
item.description:
Hello community,
I am trying to find all post related to a category but I get this error entity from endpoint “categories” with slug “rumorroundup” not found.

I have category named rumorroundup and I want to find all post related to this category but frontity showing error. Help

Thanks

Read full topic
